h1: Mission, Vision, Values What Drives Us
h2: Our Values Serve as a Compass
h3: Born With a Purpose: Our Mission
Our Vision: One Second. One Life
paragraphs: We are passionate about the difference we make in people’s lives. Every day, we dedicate ourselves to providing high-quality solutions that individuals can trust. Our commitment to our core values is visible in our daily efforts to make a meaningful difference. Discover what drives thousands of colleagues around the world at BIOTRONIK.

Born With a Purpose: Our Mission In 1963, two students embarked on a mission to perfectly match technology with the human body. That remains our company’s driving mission to this day. Dr. Max Schaldach and Otto Franke developed the first German implantable pacemaker, beginning the BIOTRONIK commitment to advance health and well-being for all people.
Our Vision: One Second. One Life Our vision is for our technology to save, extend, or improve the life of one person every second.
By developing pioneering products and services, we are changing the lives of millions living with heart disease and chronic pain – enabling them to live better, not just longer.
Our Values Serve as a Compass At BIOTRONIK, we work hard every day to make sure that our guiding principle “Excellence for Life” is reflected in everything we do.

We believe in building things that last. BIOTRONIK stands for solutions people can rely on, no matter what. Every day we invest in quality – this includes how and where we choose to produce our life-changing medical devices, and our supportive, digital health ecosystems going forward.

Safety for Patients Saving lives and improving patient health have always been BIOTRONIK’s goals. Patient wellbeing is always our top priority. That’s why we place the utmost importance on the highest safety and reliability of our products.

BIOTRONIK produces all critical components in-house, thereby maintaining complete control over the production process. Moreover, we manufacture exclusively in the high-tech countries of Germany, Singapore and the US.

Solutions for Tomorrow We take time to make decisions and constantly improve rather than push for quick results. We pursue selected innovation that leads the way, building revolutionary devices that restore the body’s original function so it can outlive its limitations. Our strength is our focus: improving people’s quality of life.

Service for Patients and Physicians Our countless interactions with healthcare professionals make the difference: focusing on service, listening closely, and ﬁnding solutions together. Collaboration always leads to the best ideas and greatest innovations..
We offer unmatched educational, logistical and technical support, and take pride in our long-term relationships with patients and physicians.
